channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Chippings and tarmac from recent pothole repair, 18th March
item.description:
Still not cleaned up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayfield Avenue, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping being done by a neighbour, 18th March
item.description:
Can Peabody please pick this up also to place signs saying the consequences of fly tipping with the cost of the fine if caught As people have become norm to fly tipping in this area now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avocet Mews, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime Scooters are banned by Lewisham Council, 18th March
item.description:
Lime Scooters are banned in the Borough of Lewisham. This is blocking a pedestrian pavement and needs to be moved within 2 hours as per Lime’s agreement with Lewisham Council.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Concorde Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked gulley, issue has not been resolved as recent rain fall highlighted nore flooding, 18th March
item.description:
Continuous flooding caused by rain and blocked gulley. Several attempts have been made to clear the blockage but the area still floods whenever there is rainfall in the area
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edison Grove, Plumstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple park lights not working, 18th March
item.description:
Can Peabody please fix this instead of just focusing on a footpath which was mainly fine

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pettman Crescent, Plumstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: None of these street lights work, 18th March
item.description:
It's been 3 weeks since people have been complaining and Peabody are too focused on making a new footpath when they should be also solving lighting issues as this is causing anti social behaviour in the park at night and making this park a hotspot for that

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pettman Crescent, Plumstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Still no lights at night, 18th March
item.description:
It's actually very dangerous now as no one wants to walk through the park after sunset with weirdos walking around

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wren Path, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter and fly tipping constantly, 18th March
item.description:
The bins on Queens Drive behind Bramfield Court are constantly overflowing, the spot is used as a fly tipping spot for lots of locals. I see people leave furniture & bags of trash in a pile there constantly, the grass behind is always covered in litter.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road has lots of damage, 18th March
item.description:
Lots of small and big pot holes on granville Road and summer lane it’s been sometime now and I think everyone thinking someone must have reported but seems like no has reported
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Summers Lane, Fallow Corner, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbours are fly tipping, 18th March
item.description:
Can we please get this cleaned up and also signs to stay the consequences of fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Avocet Mews, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verge damage, 18th March
item.description:
After the needless road resurfing in welling way riney might like to return & repair the grass verge outside number 69 that they have damaged.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Welling Way, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken rocking manhole cover, 18th March
item.description:
Sunken rocking manhole cover outside 5 and 7
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, North Cray Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of debris, 18th March
item.description:
Large quantities of debris bad for wild life and other animals

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stanhope Grove, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of rubbish on the road, 18th March
item.description:
Please remove it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping near red trade waste bin, 18th March
item.description:
Flytipping near red trade waste bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 328, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The verges are littered again, 18th March
item.description:
Please clean the verges along the cycle path. They are filthy again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 cm wide crack in paving next to manhole cover., 18th March
item.description:
Large crack opened up adjacent to manhole cover. Is beside tree outside no.8 Burnley Rd SW9

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14-25, Burnley Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left outside house, 18th March
item.description:
This resident leaves rubbish outside their house every night and foxes attack the rubbish leaving it all over the pavement and road. This resident does not use the appropriate bins, please can we do something about this?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Kent Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned pram, 18th March
item.description:
Been there a couple of weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 18th March
item.description:
Big potholes outside 60-64 Alexandra Drive. Marked up to be repaired a month ago, but nothing has happened.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Alexandra Drive, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
